description:
Parent epic: V3 E3: Context and typed results

Source task 8/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review generated `context/0`, `context_schema/0`, `output/0`, and
  `output_schema/0`.

Epic closure criteria:
- new users can pass a naked map first and add schema later
- typed results are stable enough for app code
- context/result docs avoid conflating state, memory, and output

comments.text: Reviewed generated helper surface and locked the V3 public names with tests: context/0, context_schema/0, result/0, result_schema/0. Confirmed old output helpers and no-underscore variants stay absent.

title: E3: Review generated context/0, contextschema/0, output/0, and outputschema/0
